title: Insinuation Engine
public_claim: InsinuationEngineRoom is the MuranoOS room for Nik Murano's poetic/aphoristic practice: producing short, conceptually charged lines in the "insinuation + magnitude" register — subtle gesture plus large force — while preserving lexical rarity, avoiding cliche, tracking stems, and curating poems into experimental suites (Bureaucratic Sublime, Domestic Cosmology, Language Cathedral, Temporal Paradox.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.
